_comment: Layer-1 auto-exit thresholds. EXIT-ONLY. Conservative defaults — auto-exit is a floor that prevents catastrophe, not an active trade manager. liqProximityPct/maxLossPctOfMargin require clearinghouse data (HL_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS); when absent they are auto-disabled and only maxLossUsd + health triggers run. TUNE maxLossUsd to YOUR account size (a flat $ floor does not scale to position size). lockTtlMs is the active-lock window: it doubles as the re-fire cooldown after an unknown-outcome fire and as the stuck-lock reaper window.
